entries.message: Prompts/Blocks/ directory contains V-specific references (careerspan, Vrijen Attawar) that were NOT sanitized - outside W1.1 scope but may need cleanup in a future pass
W1.3 gaps resolved by orchestrator: Added 4 missing conversation_end scripts (quick/standard/full/pii_audit) and sanitized Prompts/Blocks/*.prompt.md for V-specific references

PROJECT_REPO references in PLAN.md, CHANGELOG.md, and validate_repo.py are legitimate meta-documentation (discussing the task or validation patterns), not placeholders. Do not replace these - only actual placeholders in Python script headers need vrijenattawar URLs.
